name: SwinIFS: Landmark Guided Swin Transformer For Identity Preserving Face Super Resolution
summary: arXiv:2601.01406v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Face super-resolution aims to recover high-quality facial images from severely degraded low-resolution inputs, but remains challenging due...
description: arXiv:2601.01406v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Face super-resolution aims to recover high-quality facial images from severely degraded low-resolution inputs, but remains challenging due to the loss of fine structural details and identity-specific features. This work introduces SwinIFS, a landmark-guided super-resolution framework that integrates structural priors with hierarchical at...
author: Habiba Kausar, Saeed Anwar, Omar Jamal Hammad, Ibrahim Radwan, Abdul Bais
